Video.summary: We tear down Project Spartan to rebuild it, but its surprisingly strong engine changes our plans.
Video.title: Kaiser Jeep Chaos

Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: The guys start converting a Toyota 4Runner into a self-sustaining off road expedition vehicle.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 1: Suspension Upgrades

Video.summary: Heavy duty bumpers and rock sliders help protect the Overlanding Toyota 4Runner on the trails.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 2: Bumper Fabrication

Video.summary: We add a winch, roof top tent, LED lights, and more to our 2016 Toyota 4Runner Overlanding Project.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 3: Necessary Accessories

Video.summary: Our Overlanding 4Runner gets new exhaust and creature comforts to help while exploring the wild.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Image.alt: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Video.summary: This Small Block Ford receives big power upgrades.
Video.title: 410ci Stroker Windsor

Video.summary: We’re expecting great numbers in the dyno cell for the 410ci Small Block Ford.
Video.title: Stroker Windsor Dyno Test

Video.summary: Our 1969 Jeep M715 Project Spartan is getting a frame-up overhaul to look like a truck again.
Video.title: Lighting the Way Forward

Video.summary: We reinforce our Slant Six with a fully-forged rotating assembly.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six

Video.summary: We give our Slant Six a huge induction upgrade, a custom EFI system, and a turbocharger.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Image.alt: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Video.summary: Our Small Block Chevy cracked during a cold snap. So we’re going to put the guts in a bigger block.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: A Bigger Block

Video.summary: Once we finish assembly on our improved Compression Obsession SBC, we’ll run this mule on the dyno.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: More Power

Video.summary: We found a 1977 Granada with a great body, but several mechanical issues, and get it running right!
Video.title: Fatigued Ford

Video.summary: We wanted to build a ride that looks like a Sunday driver…until you step on the throttle!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 2

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada has achieved sleeper status!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 3

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada faces its toughest test during a full-throttle day at the drag strip.
Video.title: The Sleeper Awakens

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck and turn it into a time crunching beast on the track.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy

Video.summary: Our 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck gets a new heartbeat.
Video.title: Pro Touring Power

Video.summary: We work on the suspension of a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck.
Video.title: Track Hugging Chevy

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 and fabricate truck bed to fit our new custom Oval track rear suspension.
Video.title: Pro Touring Paint

Video.summary: We add the final touches to our OBS Pro Touring Chevy C1500 and take it to the C10 Nationals.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy - Track Approved

Video.summary: Dig's Rod Shop unveils a '47 Chevy pickup: a "Zey Bronze" stunner with 640hp and unique barn wood details.
Video.title: Digs Rod Shop - 1947 Chevy 3100

Video.summary: Shane Lile's purple-over-red '55 Chevy Bel Air Gasser: an eye-popping, custom drag strip beast!
Video.title: Shane Lile - Gasshole

Video.summary: We fabricate a new cross member, mounting brackets, and install the transfer case on our 1969 Jeep Kaiser.
Video.title: Assembling Our Base

Video.summary: Chris Ryan's "Scarlet Lady," a custom '56 Continental Mark II, embodies truly extraordinary craftsmanship.
Video.title: Chris Ryan - Scarlet Lady

Video.summary: Our famous Ford 300 comes home to the Engine Power shop for even BIGGER POWER upgrades.
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 1

Video.summary: Our Turbo Ford 300 dream build continues, assembling for big dyno power!
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 2

Video.summary: Our Turbo Ford 300 returns for dyno showdown: naturally aspirated vs. boosted!
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 3

Video.summary: Jeremy and Jimmy wear out a pair of tires testing their Trailblazer SS in a drift like fashion.
Video.title: Drifting Trailblazer

Video.summary: The Drifting Trailblazer gets more muscle under the hood.
Video.title: Drifting Power and Style

Video.summary: Part 3 of the Drifting Trailblazer, the Trailblazer gets a suspension overhaul.
Video.title: Drifting 101

Video.summary: Jeremy and Jimmy wear out some tires with their drifting Trailblazer.
Video.title: Drifting with More Power!

Video.summary: We take a 3 decade old military M530C fire truck, gut it, and turn it into a bobbed deuce.
Video.title: Military 6x6 Bobbed Deuce Part I

Video.summary: Our military deuce is turned into a customized 4x4 truck with improved suspension and load capacity.
Video.title: Military 6x6 Bobbed Deuce Part II

Video.summary: The crew makes the ultimate conversion by taking a 2007 2-wheel drive Jeep Wrangler and converting it to 4WD.
Video.title: Wrangler Re-Do

Video.summary: Out of the shop and into the yard! We take a weekend to rebuild a 350ci small block Chevy V8.
Video.title: Backyard Engine Build

Video.summary: We take the 350ci Small Block Chevy built in the parking lot and upgrade short block assembly.
Video.title: Backyard Build Upgrades

Video.summary: We finish our 350 Small Block Chevy with high-performance induction, then put it to the test.
Video.title: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Image.alt: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Video.summary: Mike and Pat modernize a mid 90's themed Pro Street '62 Chevy II Nova.
Video.title: Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I

Image.alt: Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I
Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I
Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I

Video.summary: We upgrade our 5.3 LS with forged parts, cam, EFI then dyno NA & boosted on 93 octane.
Video.title: Salvage to Savage 5.3 LS

Video.summary: We revive a 505ci RB Mopar with upgrades and a fresh look, unleashing more power for a hotrod build.
Video.title: 505ci Monster Mopar

Video.summary: We build a big-inch, pump-gas Chevy W-Series monster from an aluminum block!
Video.title: 509ci W-Series Big Block Chevy Part 1

Video.summary: We continue building our 509ci W-Series with high-flow induction and EFI for big dyno power.
Video.title: 509ci W-Series Big Block Chevy Part 2

Video.summary: We bring in a Datsun 280Z and take a look at how it handles on the road.
Video.title: Datsun 280Z Heritage Build Part 1

Video.summary: We start tearing into the powertrain of our Datsun 280Z.
Video.title: Datsun 280Z Heritage Build Part 2

Video.summary: We upgrade our 280Z's suspension to give it better handling.
Video.title: Datsun 280Z Heritage Build Part 3

Video.summary: The Carcass crew makes body modifications to our 1978 280Z that take on some JDM styling cues
Video.title: Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Body Mods and Paint

Image.alt: Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Body Mods and Paint
Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Body Mods and Paint
Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Body Mods and Paint

Video.summary: We put the last few pieces on our 1978 Datsun 280Z project, adding exhaust and fuel injection.
Video.title: Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff

Image.alt: Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff
Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff
Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff

Video.summary: Ian tears down and refreshes a junkyard 5.7L Hemi for his '68 military Kaiser Jeep off-road rat rod
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Hemi

Video.summary: Ian wraps up his junkyard military Jeep fabricating a custom stainless exhaust and plumbing the fuel system
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Final Prep

Video.summary: Ian bullet-proofs his rusted out M715 Jeep building the ultimate driver cage using a high tech tubing bender
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Cage Fight

Video.summary: Ian finishes his Kaiser 4WD just in time to baptize the junkyard recovery Jeep on the red rocks of Moab, Utah
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Moab or Bust
